build.buildCommand: npm install --include=optional --no-audit --no-fund && npx puppeteer browsers install chrome && npm run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r apps/api/dist/. dist/

deploy.releaseCommand: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma || echo '[release] prisma migrate deploy failed; continuing startup'

deploy.startCommand: node -e "console.log('[Worker] Worker co-located with API. This container is idle.'); setInterval(function(){}, 2147483647);"
